prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `281123b4`.
codex_response:
The rule is: split the `4x19` input into four `4x4` monochrome panels around the green separator columns, then overlay them with precedence `5 -> 8 -> 4 -> 9`. I used the `opus46` hint because it matched the official examples; I discarded the `sonnet45` hint as too incomplete and documented that in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_281123b4/notes.md).

The generator stays close to the family by keeping the fixed panel/separator layout and sampling per-panel occupancies in the same rough density bands as the official task, rather than inventing connected-shape noise. No new shared primitive was needed.
